pages.text: A broad island cradling a $(bold)proper deep lake$() — a wide, deep pool rather than the small pond of the standard Aquatic isle.
$(bold)Life in deep water$()$(br)Squid and salmon swim the freshwater lake, and the depth is enough for $(item)glow squid$() to settle. Clay and gravel fill the body in quantity.
$(bold)Reefs and swamps$()$(br)Over a warm ocean the lake becomes a deep coral reef with tropical fish, cod and pufferfish; over a swamp, a lily-strewn pool with frogs.
